hero.subtitle: AI-powered cash flow intelligence that predicts financial crises before they happen. Clarity, not guesswork.
hero.dashboardAlt: Verity Dashboard - Cash flow analytics and financial health monitoring

features.sectionSubtitle: Every decision powered by data, explained in full, and designed to protect your business.

items.title: Cash Crisis Prediction
items.description: Know when cash tightens before it happens. Our AI analyzes patterns that precede financial crises by up to 60 days.

items.title: Behavioral Intelligence
items.description: We don't just track numbers — we learn how companies react to them. Unique behavioral economic data no one else has.

items.title: Radical Conservatism
items.description: Always pessimistic scenarios first. We never sell dreams — we show what happens if everything goes wrong.

items.title: Full Explainability
items.description: No black boxes. Every insight is traceable and auditable. You see exactly why the AI reached its conclusion.

items.title: Scenario Simulation
items.description: Explore what-if scenarios instantly. Make informed decisions with clear paths, not orders.

items.title: Deep Integration
items.description: Connect accounting, payroll, payments, CRM, and operations. Switching becomes impossible — we become infrastructure.

methodology.sectionSubtitle: We're not building an AI product. We're building the financial nervous system of companies.

pillars.title: Cash Management Under Uncertainty
pillars.description: The most critical decision any company makes: 'How long do I survive if things get worse?' We predict when cash tightens, explain why, and show what to do — with scenarios, not orders.

pillars.title: Data Nobody Else Has
pillars.description: Beyond revenue and expenses, we capture what companies asked, feared, simulated, and did after. This creates behavioral economic intelligence — a dataset nearly impossible to replicate.

pillars.title: Trust Through Transparency
pillars.description: Conservative by default. Fully explainable. Clear boundaries. We show pessimistic scenarios first, never hide behind 'the AI decided', and always state what we do — and what we don't.

pillars.title: From Software to Infrastructure
pillars.description: Banks use our scores for credit. Insurers for pricing. Investors for due diligence. We don't sell software — we sell economic truth. In 5 years, replicating this costs billions.

cta.title: Clarity before the crisis
cta.subtitle: Start understanding your cash flow like never before. No guesswork, no black boxes — just financial truth.

toast.comingSoon: We're still building the tool. Stay tuned!
